title: Bostik Hard Plastics Clear Glue 20ml Tube - Ultra Strong - Quick Drying Glue - Formulated For Hard Plastics Such As ABS and PVC-U
features: • Ideal for tough repairs to acrylic, PVC-u, and similar materials
description: From the manufacturer Repair with confidence: Bostik Hard Plastics Clear Glue Achieve strong, durable repairs with Bostik Hard Plastics Clear Glue. This high-performance adhesive is perfect for bonding various plastics, ensuring a clear, lasting bond for all your repair needs. Perfect for every plastic repair Bostik Hard Plastics Clear Glue is ideal for repairing household items. Whether fixing a broken plastic toy, mending a cracked PVC pipe, or bonding ABS parts, this adhesive ensures a professional finish. Suitable for use on PVC-U, ABS, High Impact Polystyrene and even wood, metal, and leather, it provides reliable results every time. Effortless application for professional-looking repairs Using Bostik Hard Plastics Clear Glue is simple. Ensure surfaces are clean and dry. Apply the adhesive evenly to both surfaces and press them together firmly. Allow the bond to set for a few minutes. For best results, let the bond cure for 24 hours. Clean tools with acetone before the adhesive sets - always carry out a test patch before full application. Advantages EXTRA STRONG BOND: Provides a robust and durable bond for tough repairs on rigid plastics. QUICK DRYING: Dries rapidly, allowing you to use repaired items sooner. VERSATILE APPLICATION: Suitable for PVC-U, ABS, and High Impact Polystyrene. EASY TO APPLY: Simple application process for quick and efficient repairs. CLEAR FINISH: Dries clear for an invisible bond.
